observation: CoinDesk reported that the May 26, 2019 CLAM crash caused margin-loan defaults on Poloniex
market_health_use: Track thin-collateral crashes that can trigger lending-system losses

observation: CoinDesk reported about 1,800 BTC in BTC margin-lending pool losses, worth roughly $13.5 million at the time
market_health_use: Measure lender loss in both native asset and USD terms

observation: Finance Magnates reported that the loss was socialized across BTC margin lenders
market_health_use: Monitor whether lending-pool losses are borrower-specific or pooled across lenders

observation: Finance Magnates reported that Poloniex credited impacted lenders with 10% of their losses initially
market_health_use: Track recovery timing and partial repayment as market-confidence signals

observation: Crypto Economy reported that Poloniex added new market and lending rules after the CLAM event
market_health_use: Measure whether platform controls directly address collateral concentration and liquidation depth
